# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.
# Category: cicd_security

```groovy
pipeline {
    agent any

    parameters {
        string(
            name: 'ARTIFACT_URLS',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Comma-separated list of artifact URLs to download (supports S3, Artifactory, HTTP/HTTPS)'
        )
        string(
            name: 'DEPLOY_SERVERS',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Comma-separated list of production server hostnames/IPs to deploy to'
        )
        string(
            name: 'DEPLOY_PATH',
            defaultValue: '/opt/app/deploy',
            description: 'Target deployment directory on production servers'
        )
        string(
            name: 'DEPLOY_USER',
            defaultValue: 'deploy',
            description: 'SSH user for deployment to production servers'
        )
        credentials(
            name: 'SSH_CREDENTIALS_ID',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'SSH credentials for connecting to production servers',
            credentialType: 'com.cloudbees.jenkins.plugins.sshcredentials.impl.BasicSSHUserPrivateKey'
        )
        credentials(
            name: 'ARTIFACTORY_CREDENTIALS_ID',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Credentials for Artifactory authentication (optional)',
            credentialType: 'com.cloudbees.plugins.credentials.impl.UsernamePasswordCredentialsImpl'
        )
        credentials(
            name: 'AWS_CREDENTIALS_ID',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'AWS credentials for S3 access (optional)',
            credentialType: 'com.cloudbees.jenkins.plugins.awscredentials.AWSCredentialsImpl'
        )
        string(
            name: 'HEALTH_CHECK_URL_PATH',
            defaultValue: '/health',
            description: 'Health check endpoint path to verify deployment (e.g., /health)'
        )
        string(
            name: 'HEALTH_CHECK_PORT',
            defaultValue: '8080',
            description: 'Port for health check'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'DRY_RUN',
            defaultValue: false,
            description: 'If true, download artifacts but skip actual deployment'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'SKIP_HEALTH_CHECK',
            defaultValue: false,
            description: 'Skip post-deployment health checks'
        )
        string(
            name: 'PRE_DEPLOY_SCRIPT',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Optional script to run on each server before deployment'
        )
        string(
            name: 'POST_DEPLOY_SCRIPT',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Optional script to run on each server after deployment'
        )
        choice(
            name: 'DEPLOY_STRATEGY',
            choices: ['rolling', 'parallel', 'blue-green'],
            description: 'Deployment strategy to use'
        )
        string(
            name: 'ROLLBACK_ARTIFACT_URLS',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Comma-separated artifact URLs for rollback (optional)'
        )
    }

    environment {
        ARTIFACTS_DIR = "${WORKSPACE}/artifacts"
        ROLLBACK_DIR = "${WORKSPACE}/rollback_artifacts"
        CHECKSUM_FILE = "${WORKSPACE}/artifacts/checksums.sha256"
        DEPLOY_TIMESTAMP = sh(script: 'date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S', returnStdout: true).trim()
    }

    options {
        timestamps()
        timeout(time: 60, unit: 'MINUTES')
        buildDiscarder(logRotator(numToKeepStr: '20'))
        disableConcurrentBuilds()
    }

    stages {
        stage('Validate Parameters') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Validating Pipeline Parameters ==="

                    if (!params.ARTIFACT_URLS?.trim()) {
                        error "ARTIFACT_URLS parameter is required. Provide comma-separated URLs."
                    }
                    if (!params.DEPLOY_SERVERS?.trim()) {
                        error "DEPLOY_SERVERS parameter is required. Provide comma-separated server addresses."
                    }
                    if (!params.SSH_CREDENTIALS_ID?.trim()) {
                        error "SSH_CREDENTIALS_ID is required for deployment."
                    }

                    env.ARTIFACT_URL_LIST = params.ARTIFACT_URLS.trim()
                    env.SERVER_LIST = params.DEPLOY_SERVERS.trim()

                    def urls = env.ARTIFACT_URL_LIST.split(',').collect { it.trim() }.findAll { it }
                    def servers = env.SERVER_LIST.split(',').collect { it.trim() }.findAll { it }

                    echo "Artifacts to download (${urls.size()}):"
                    urls.eachWithIndex { url, idx ->
                        echo "  [${idx + 1}] ${url}"
                    }

                    echo "Target servers (${servers.size()}):"
                    servers.eachWithIndex { server, idx ->
                        echo "  [${idx + 1}] ${server}"
                    }

                    echo "Deploy path: ${params.DEPLOY_PATH}"
                    echo "Deploy strategy: ${params.DEPLOY_STRATEGY}"
                    echo "Dry run: ${params.DRY_RUN}"

                    // Validate URLs
                    urls.each { url ->
                        if (!url.matches('^(https?|s3)://.*')) {
                            error "Invalid URL format: ${url}. Must start with http://, https://, or s3://"
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Prepare Workspace') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Preparing workspace ==="
                    sh """
                        rm -rf ${ARTIFACTS_DIR}
                        mkdir -p ${ARTIFACTS_DIR}
                        rm -rf ${ROLLBACK_DIR}
                        mkdir -p ${ROLLBACK_DIR}
                    """
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Download Artifacts') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Downloading Artifacts ==="
                    def urls = env.ARTIFACT_URL_LIST.split(',').collect { it.trim() }.findAll { it }
                    def downloadResults = [:]

                    urls.each { url ->
                        def filename = extractFilename(url)
                        def targetPath = "${ARTIFACTS_DIR}/${filename}"

                        echo "Downloading: ${url} -> ${targetPath}"

                        try {
                            if (url.startsWith('s3://')) {
                                downloadFromS3(url, targetPath)
                            } else if (url.contains('artifactory') || url.contains('jfrog')) {
                                downloadFromArtifactory(url, targetPath)
                            } else {
                                downloadFromHttp(url, targetPath)
                            }

                            // Verify the file was downloaded
                            def fileExists = sh(
                                script: "test -f '${targetPath}' && echo 'true' || echo 'false'",
                                returnStdout: true
                            ).trim()

                            if (fileExists == 'true') {
                                def fileSize = sh(
                                    script: "stat -c%s '${targetPath}' 2>/dev/null || stat -f%z '${targetPath}' 2>/dev/null",
                                    returnStdout: true
                                ).trim()
                                echo "Successfully downloaded ${filename} (${fileSize} bytes)"
                                downloadResults[filename] = 'SUCCESS'
                            } else {
                                error "File not found after download: ${targetPath}"
                            }
                        } catch (Exception e) {
                            downloadResults[filename] = "FAILED: ${e.message}"
                            error "Failed to download artifact from ${url}: ${e.message}"
                        }
                    }

                    // Generate checksums
                    sh """
                        cd ${ARTIFACTS_DIR}
                        sha256sum * > ${CHECKSUM_FILE} 2>/dev/null || shasum -a 256 * > ${CHECKSUM_FILE} 2>/dev/null || true
                    """

                    echo "=== Download Summary ==="
                    downloadResults.each { file, status ->
                        echo "  ${file}: ${status}"
                    }

                    echo "=== Checksums ==="
                    sh "cat ${CHECKSUM_FILE} || echo 'No checksums generated'"
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Download Rollback Artifacts') {
            when {
                expression { return params.ROLLBACK_ARTIFACT_URLS?.trim() }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Downloading Rollback Artifacts ==="
                    def urls = params.ROLLBACK_ARTIFACT_URLS.trim().split(',').collect { it.trim() }.findAll { it }

                    urls.each { url ->
                        def filename = extractFilename(url)
                        def targetPath = "${ROLLBACK_DIR}/${filename}"

                        echo "Downloading rollback artifact: ${url} -> ${targetPath}"

                        try {
                            if (url.startsWith('s3://')) {
                                downloadFromS3(url, targetPath)
                            } else if (url.contains('artifactory') || url.contains('jfrog')) {
                                downloadFromArtifactory(url, targetPath)
                            } else {
                                downloadFromHttp(url, targetPath)
                            }
                            echo "Rollback artifact downloaded: ${filename}"
                        } catch (Exception e) {
                            echo "WARNING: Failed to download rollback artifact: ${e.message}"
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Verify Artifacts') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Verifying Downloaded Artifacts ==="

                    def artifactFiles = sh(
                        script: "ls -la ${ARTIFACTS_DIR}/ | grep -v checksums.sha256 | tail -n +2",
                        returnStdout: true
                    ).trim()

                    echo "Downloaded artifacts:\n${artifactFiles}"

                    def fileCount = sh(
                        script: "find ${ARTIFACTS_DIR} -maxdepth 1 -type f ! -name 'checksums.sha256' | wc -l",
                        returnStdout: true
                    ).trim().toInteger()

                    def expectedCount = env.ARTIFACT_URL_LIST.split(',').collect { it.trim() }.findAll { it }.size()

                    if (fileCount != expectedCount) {
                        error "Expected ${expectedCount} artifacts but found ${fileCount}"
                    }

                    echo "All ${fileCount} artifacts verified successfully"

                    // Check for zero-byte files
                    def emptyFiles = sh(
                        script: "find ${ARTIFACTS_DIR} -maxdepth 1 -type f -empty ! -name 'checksums.sha256'",
                        returnStdout: true
                    ).trim()

                    if (emptyFiles) {
                        error "Found empty artifact files:\n${emptyFiles}"
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Pre-Deployment Backup') {
            when {
                expression { return !params.DRY_RUN }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Creating Pre-Deployment Backup ==="
                    def servers = env.SERVER_LIST.split(',').collect { it.trim() }.findAll { it }

                    sshagent(credentials: [params.SSH_CREDENTIALS_ID]) {
                        servers.each { server ->
                            echo "Backing up current deployment on ${server}..."
                            try {
                                sh """
                                    ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ${params.DEPLOY_USER}@${server} '
                                        BACKUP_DIR="${params.DEPLOY_PATH}_backup_${DEPLOY_TIMESTAMP}"
                                        if [ -d "${params.DEPLOY_PATH}" ]; then
                                            echo "Creating backup at \${BACKUP_DIR}"
                                            cp -a "${params.DEPLOY_PATH}" "\${BACKUP_DIR}"
                                            echo "Backup created successfully"
                                            # Keep only last 5 backups
                                            ls -dt ${params.DEPLOY_PATH}_backup_* 2>/dev/null | tail -n +6 | xargs rm -rf 2>/dev/null || true
                                        else
                                            echo "No existing deployment to backup"
                                        fi
                                    '
                                """
                            } catch (Exception e) {
                                echo "WARNING: Backup failed on ${server}: ${e.message}"
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy to Production') {
            when {
                expression { return !params.DRY_RUN }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Deploying to Production (Strategy: ${params.DEPLOY_STRATEGY}) ==="
                    def servers = env.SERVER_LIST.split(',').collect { it.trim() }.findAll { it }

                    switch (params.DEPLOY_STRATEGY) {
                        case 'rolling':
                            deployRolling(servers)
                            break
                        case 'parallel':
                            deployParallel(servers)
                            break
                        case 'blue-green':
                            deployBlueGreen(servers)
                            break
                        default:
                            error "Unknown deploy strategy: ${params.DEPLOY_STRATEGY}"
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Dry Run Summary') {
            when {
                expression { return params.DRY_RUN }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== DRY RUN - No deployment performed ==="
                    echo "The following artifacts would be deployed:"
                    sh "ls -la ${ARTIFACTS_DIR}/"
                    echo "To the following servers:"
                    env.SERVER_LIST.split(',').collect { it.trim() }.findAll { it }.each { server ->
                        echo "  - ${server}:${params.DEPLOY_PATH}"
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Post-Deployment Health Check') {
            when {
                expression { return !params.DRY_RUN && !params.SKIP_HEALTH_CHECK }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Running Post-Deployment Health Checks ==="
                    def servers = env.SERVER_LIST.split(',').collect { it.trim() }.findAll { it }
                    def healthCheckResults = [:]
                    def allHealthy = true

                    servers.each { server ->
                        echo "Health checking ${server}..."
                        def healthy = false
                        def maxRetries = 10
                        def retryDelay = 10

                        for (int attempt = 1; attempt <= maxRetries; attempt++) {
                            try {
                                def healthUrl = "http://${server}:${params.HEALTH_CHECK_PORT}${params.HEALTH_CHECK_URL_PATH}"
                                def statusCode = sh(
                                    script: "curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' --connect-timeout 5 --max-time 10 '${healthUrl}'",
                                    returnStdout: true
                                ).trim()

                                if (statusCode == '200') {
                                    echo "  [${attempt}/${maxRetries}] ${server} is healthy (HTTP ${statusCode})"
                                    healthy = true
                                    break
                                } else {
                                    echo "  [${attempt}/${maxRetries}] ${server} returned HTTP ${statusCode}, retrying in ${retryDelay}s..."
                                }
                            } catch (Exception e) {
                                echo "  [${attempt}/${maxRetries}] Health check failed for ${server}: ${e.message}"
                            }

                            if (attempt < maxRetries) {
                                sleep(retryDelay)
                            }
                        }

                        healthCheckResults[server] = healthy ? 'HEALTHY' : 'UNHEALTHY'
                        if (!healthy) {
                            allHealthy = false
                        }
                    }

                    echo "=== Health Check Summary ==="
                    healthCheckResults.each { server, status ->
                        echo "  ${server}: ${status}"
                    }

                    if (!allHealthy) {
                        def unhealthyServers = healthCheckResults.findAll { it.value == 'UNHEALTHY' }.collect { it.key }
                        echo "WARNING: Unhealthy servers detected: ${unhealthyServers.join(', ')}"
                        echo "Initiating rollback..."
                        performRollback(unhealthyServers)
                        error "Deployment failed health checks on: ${unhealthyServers.join(', ')}. Rollback performed."
                    }

                    echo "All servers are healthy!"
                }
            }
        }
    }

    post {
        success {
            script {
                echo "=== Deployment Completed Successfully ==="
                echo "Timestamp: ${DEPLOY_TIMESTAMP}"
                echo "Strategy: ${params.DEPLOY_STRATEGY}"
                echo "Dry Run: ${params.DRY_RUN}"
                if (!params.DRY_RUN) {
                    echo "Artifacts deployed to: ${params.DEPLOY_PATH}"
                    echo "Servers: ${env.SERVER_LIST}"
                }
            }
        }
        failure {
            script {
                echo "=== Deployment FAILED ==="
                echo "Check the logs above for details."
                if (!params.DRY_RUN) {
                    echo "A rollback may have been attempted. Verify server state manually."
                }
            }
        }
        always {
            script {
                echo "=== Archiving artifacts and cleaning up ==="
                archiveArtifacts artifacts: 'artifacts/checksums.sha256', allowEmptyArchive: true
            }
            cleanWs(
                cleanWhenSuccess: true,
                cleanWhenFailure: false,
                cleanWhenAborted: true
            )
        }
    }
}

// ==================== Helper Functions ====================

def extractFilename(String url) {
    if (url.startsWith('s3://')) {
        return url.tokenize('/')[-1]
    }
    def cleanUrl = url.split('\\?')[0]
    def filename = cleanUrl.tokenize('/')[-1]
    if (!filename || filename.isEmpty()) {
        filename = "artifact_${System.currentTimeMillis()}"
    }
    return filename
}

def downloadFromS3(String s3Url, String targetPath) {
    if (params.AWS_CREDENTIALS_ID?.trim()) {
        withCredentials([[$class: 'AmazonWebServicesCredentialsBinding',
                          credentialsId: params.AWS_CREDENTIALS_ID,
                          accessKeyVariable: 'AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID',
                          secretKeyVariable: 'AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY']]) {
            sh """
                aws s3 cp '${s3Url}' '${targetPath}'
            """
        }
    } else {
        // Use instance profile or default credentials
        sh """
            aws s3 cp '${s3Url}' '${targetPath}'
        """
    }
}

def downloadFromArtifactory(String url, String targetPath) {
    if (params.ARTIFACTORY_CREDENTIALS_ID?.trim()) {
        withCredentials([usernamePassword(
            credentialsId: params.ARTIFACTORY_CREDENTIALS_ID,
            usernameVariable: 'ARTIFACTORY_USER',
            passwordVariable: 'ARTIFACTORY_PASSWORD'
        )]) {
            sh """
                curl -fSL --retry 3 --retry-delay 5 \
                    -u "\${ARTIFACTORY_USER}:\${ARTIFACTORY_PASSWORD}" \
                    -o '${targetPath}' \
                    '${url}'
            """
        }
    } else {
        sh """
            curl -fSL --retry 3 --retry-delay 5 \
                -o '${targetPath}' \
                '${url}'
        """
    }
}

def downloadFromHttp(String url, String targetPath) {
    sh """
        curl -fSL --retry 3 --retry-delay 5 \
            -o '${targetPath}' \
            '${url}'
    """
}

def deployToServer(String server) {
    echo "Deploying to ${server}..."

    sshagent(credentials: [params.SSH_CREDENTIALS_ID]) {
        // Run pre-deploy script if provided
        if (params.PRE_DEPLOY_SCRIPT?.trim()) {
            echo "Running pre-deploy script on ${server}..."
            sh """
                ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ${params.DEPLOY_USER}@${server} '${params.PRE_DEPLOY_SCRIPT}'
            """
        }

        // Ensure target directory exists
        sh """
            ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ${params.DEPLOY_USER}@${server} '
                mkdir -p "${params.DEPLOY_PATH}"
            '
        """

        // Transfer artifacts
        def artifactFiles = sh(
            script: "find ${ARTIFACTS_DIR} -maxdepth 1 -type f ! -name 'checksums.sha256' -printf '%f\\n'",
            returnStdout: true
        ).trim().split('\n')

        artifactFiles.each { filename ->
            if (filename?.trim()) {
                echo "  Transferring ${filename} to ${server}..."
                sh """
                    scp -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no \
                        '${ARTIFACTS_DIR}/${filename}' \
                        '${params.DEPLOY_USER}@${server}:${params.DEPLOY_PATH}/${filename}'
                """
            }
        }

        // Set permissions and extract if needed
        sh """
            ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ${params.DEPLOY_USER}@${server} '
                cd "${params.DEPLOY_PATH}"
                for f in *.tar.gz *.tgz; do
                    if [ -f "\$f" ]; then
                        echo "Extracting \$f..."
                        tar -xzf "\$f"
                    fi
                done
                for f in *.zip; do
                    if [ -f "\$f" ]; then
                        echo "Extracting \$f..."
                        unzip -o "\$f"
                    fi
                done
                chmod -R 755 "${params.DEPLOY_PATH}"
                echo "Deployment files on server:"
                ls -la "${params.DEPLOY_PATH}/"
            '
        """

        // Run post-deploy script if provided
        if (params.POST_DEPLOY_SCRIPT?.trim()) {
            echo "Running post-deploy script on ${server}..."
            sh """
                ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ${params.DEPLOY_USER}@${server} '${params.POST_DEPLOY_SCRIPT}'
            """
        }
    }

    echo "Deployment to ${server} completed"
}

def deployRolling(List<String> servers) {
    echo "=== Rolling Deployment ==="
    servers.eachWithIndex { server, idx ->
        echo "--- Deploying to server ${idx + 1}/${servers.size()}: ${server} ---"

        try {
            deployToServer(server)

            // Health check after each server in rolling deployment
            if (!params.SKIP_HEALTH_CHECK) {
                echo "Verifying ${server} before proceeding..."
                def healthy = waitForHealth(server, 5, 10)
                if (!healthy) {
                    echo "WARNING: ${server} failed health check after deployment"
                    performRollback([server])
                    error "Rolling deployment stopped: ${server} is unhealthy after deployment"
                }
            }

            if (idx < servers.size() - 1) {
                echo "Waiting 10 seconds before next server..."
                sleep(10)
            }
        } catch (Exception e) {
            error "Rolling deployment failed at ${server}: ${e.message}"
        }
    }
}

def deployParallel(List<String> servers) {
    echo "=== Parallel Deployment ==="
    def parallelStages = [:]

    servers.each { server ->
        parallelStages["Deploy to ${server}"] = {
            deployToServer(server)
        }
    }

    parallel parallelStages
}

def deployBlueGreen(List<String> servers) {
    echo "=== Blue-Green Deployment ==="

    if (servers.size() < 2) {
        echo "WARNING: Blue-Green strategy requires at least 2 servers. Falling back to rolling deployment."
        deployRolling(servers)
        return
    }

    def midpoint = (servers.size() / 2).toInteger()
    def blueServers = servers[0..<midpoint]
    def greenServers = servers[midpoint..<servers.size()]

    echo "Blue group (${blueServers.size()} servers): ${blueServers.join(', ')}"
    echo "Green group (${greenServers.size()} servers): ${greenServers.join(', ')}"

    // Deploy to green group first
    echo "--- Phase 1: Deploying to Green group ---"
    def greenStages = [:]
    greenServers.each { server ->
        greenStages["Deploy to ${server} (Green)"] = {
            deployToServer(server)
        }
    }
    parallel greenStages

    // Verify green group
    if (!params.SKIP_HEALTH_CHECK) {
        echo "Verifying Green group..."
        def allGreenHealthy = true
        greenServers.each { server ->
            if (!waitForHealth(server, 5, 10)) {
                allGreenHealthy = false
                echo "WARNING: Green server ${server} is unhealthy!"
            }
        }
        if (!allGreenHealthy) {
            performRollback(greenServers)
            error "Blue-Green deployment aborted: Green group failed health checks"
        }
        echo "Green group is healthy. Proceeding to Blue group."
    }

    // Deploy to blue group
    echo "--- Phase 2: Deploying to Blue group ---"
    def blueStages = [:]
    blueServers.each { server ->
        blueStages["Deploy to ${server} (Blue)"] = {
            deployToServer(server)
        }
    }
    parallel blueStages

    echo "Blue-Green deployment completed"
}

def waitForHealth(String server, int maxRetries, int retryDelay) {
    for (int attempt = 1; attempt <= maxRetries; attempt++) {
        try {
            def healthUrl = "http://${server}:${params.HEALTH_CHECK_PORT}${params.HEALTH_CHECK_URL_PATH}"
            def statusCode = sh(
                script: "curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' --connect-timeout 5 --max-time 10 '${healthUrl}'",
                returnStdout: true
            ).trim()

            if (statusCode == '200') {
                return true
            }
            echo "  Health check attempt ${attempt}/${maxRetries}: HTTP ${statusCode}"
        } catch (Exception e) {
            echo "  Health check attempt ${attempt}/${maxRetries}: ${e.message}"
        }

        if (attempt < maxRetries) {
            sleep(retryDelay)
        }
    }
    return false
}

def performRollback(List<String> servers) {
    echo "=== Performing Rollback ==="

    sshagent(credentials: [params.SSH_CREDENTIALS_ID]) {
        servers.each { server ->
            echo "Rolling back ${server}..."
            try {
                // Check if we have rollback artifacts
                def hasRollbackArtifacts = sh(
                    script: "find ${ROLLBACK_DIR} -maxdepth 1 -type f | head -1",
                    returnStdout: true
                ).trim()

                if (hasRollbackArtifacts) {
                    echo "Using rollback artifacts for ${server}..."
                    sh """
                        ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ${params.DEPLOY_USER}@${server} '
                            rm -rf "${params.DEPLOY_PATH}"/*
                        '
                    """
                    def rollbackFiles = sh(
                        script: "find ${ROLLBACK_DIR} -maxdepth 1 -type f -printf '%f\\n'",
                        returnStdout: true
                    ).trim().split('\n')

                    rollbackFiles.each { filename ->
                        if (filename?.trim()) {
                            sh """
                                scp -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no \
                                    '${ROLLBACK_DIR}/${filename}' \
                                    '${params.DEPLOY_USER}@${server}:${params.DEPLOY_PATH}/${filename}'
                            """
                        }
                    }
                } else {
                    // Rollback from backup
                    echo "Restoring from backup on ${server}..."
                    sh """
                        ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ${params.DEPLOY_USER}@${server} '
                            LATEST_BACKUP=\$(ls -dt ${params.DEPLOY_PATH}_backup_* 2>/dev/null | head -1)
                            if [ -n "\${LATEST_BACKUP}" ] && [ -d "\${LATEST_BACKUP}" ]; then
                                echo "Restoring from backup: \${LATEST_BACKUP}"
                                rm -rf "${params.DEPLOY_PATH}"
                                cp -a "\${LATEST_BACKUP}" "${params.DEPLOY_PATH}"
                                echo "Rollback from backup completed"
                            else
                                echo "WARNING: No backup found for rollback on this server"
                            fi
                        '
                    """
                }

                // Run post-deploy script after rollback if configured
                if (params.POST_DEPLOY_SCRIPT?.trim()) {
                    echo "Running post-deploy script after rollback on ${server}..."
                    sh """
                        ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ${params.DEPLOY_USER}@${server} '${params.POST_DEPLOY_SCRIPT}'
                    """
                }

                echo "Rollback completed for ${server}"
            } catch (Exception e) {
                echo "ERROR: Rollback failed for ${server}: ${e.message}"
            }
        }
    }
}
